flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Regis College fell 23% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2k → 956).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Regis College fell 11% between 2006 and 2009 (76.0% → 67.5%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Regis College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($44.8k → $49.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Regis College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($44.8k → $49.7k).
